content.title: Rivetweb
content.headline: Rivetweb: easy web programming with Tcl

pagetext.p: Rivetweb is a minimum requirements Tcl engine for creating template based websites. The only required software packages you need are the Apache HTTP Webserver, Apache Rivet, the Tcl programming language with its OO extension Itcl and (in the current implementation) also tdom, the XML and DOM manipulator package for the Tcl programming language. Some efforts are under way in order to rewrite Rivetweb with the TclOO native object system. At the Rivetweb examples page you may read an (incomplete) list of working web sites based on Rivetweb
Rivetweb internal machinery and organizazion is entirely developed in Tcl. Rivetweb is a lightweight fully customizable, extensible framework to script websites.

At the core of Rivetweb there is a simple pattern of collaborating classes. The 2 basic concepts are the Data Source and the Page Model. Data sources provide models for accessing data and collaborate with page models, classes that implement a view and are responsible for generating the output.
Rivetweb can handle multilingual content, produces output based on multiple templates and cooperates with mod_rewrite to provide uniform URI schemes for your application.

content.title: Rivetweb: semplice generatore di HTML basato su Tcl

pagetext.p: Il sito di Rivetweb e' in costruzione
